prompt: Audit and rewrite this at balanced depth.

assertions.name: audit-shown-before-rewrite
assertions.description: Audit findings appear in output before the rewrite

assertions.name: rewrite-produced
assertions.description: Output contains a rewritten version of the input draft
assertions.check: output contains a prose block of similar length to input that differs from input

assertions.name: no-manufactured-insight
assertions.description: No manufactured insight phrases in rewrite

assertions.name: no-signposted-conclusions
assertions.description: No signposted conclusion phrases in rewrite

assertions.name: rewrite-passes-balanced-grader
assertions.description: Re-grading the rewrite at balanced depth produces 0 hard_fail and 0 strong_warning hits

assertions.name: meaning-preserved
assertions.description: Rewrite preserves the personal anecdote, the central realisation, and the reflective stance
